steps.t: Grúmachath can be found to the north-east of the Mur Shatraug, the Witch-gate. After escaping with your aid, Múta intends to join the Zhélruka expedit…
Múta can be found at Grúmachath. After arriving at Grúmachath, Múta ran off toward the centre of the encampment. You should join Múta by the camp-fire…
Múta can be found at Grúmachath. You have found Múta speaking to the Zhélruka in charge of Grúmachath. You should talk to Múta.
Mézto can be found at Grúmachath. You have found Múta speaking to the Zhélruka in charge of Grúmachath, Mézto. You should talk to Mézto.
